compiled_state.title: Replace per-file confirmation with batched summary in architect-foundation Phase 2.75
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Replace the current Phase 2.75 section (lines 164-172) in plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md.

Remove: per-file 'Does this look right? Should I write this file?' confirmation pattern.

Replace with batched approach:
1. Summary table of all artifacts to be written (File, Type, Action)
2. Diffs for existing files (show diff against existing content, not full replacement)
3. Full content for new files in fenced code block
4. Single confirmation: 'Proceed with writing all N files?' — NOT per-file
5. Write all files in sequence after confirmation
6. Partial failure handling: preserve already-written files, report failures

Pattern satisfaction (verified against replacement text):
- present.*artifact: 'present a batched summary of all enforcement artifacts' ✓
- diff.*existing: 'show a diff against the existing content' ✓
- single.*confirmation: 'Single confirmation: Ask once:' ✓
- summary.*artifact: 'batched summary of all enforcement artifacts' ✓
- partial.*fail: 'Partial failure handling: If any Write call fails' ✓

Makes Task 088c-a0d2's RED tests turn GREEN.
Phase 2.5 accept/reject section (lines 126-162) must remain UNCHANGED.

testing_mode: GREEN
File: plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
